nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 稀树草原
nodes.summary: 东非常见的开放草地与湿地边缘复合景观。

nodes.name: 北阿坎德邦
nodes.summary: 北阿坎德邦是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联9种鸟类，包括针尾绿鸠、尼泊尔鹪鹛、灰背燕尾等9种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 不丹
nodes.summary: 不丹是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联156种鸟类，包括青头潜鸭、红胸山鹧鸪、红胸角雉等156种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 棕颈雪雀
nodes.summary: 棕颈雪雀（Rufous-necked snowfinch，学名 Pyrgilauda ruficollis），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，主要分布于北阿坎德邦、不丹，常见栖息地包括稀树草原。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is naturally found in Tibet and adjacent areas of central and western China, in the alpine temperate grassland and barren stony steppes and plateaus; it winters south to Uttarakhand, Nepal, Sikkim and Bhutan, sometimes to lower altitudes

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is naturally found in Tibet and adjacent areas of central and western China, in the alpine temperate grassland and barren stony steppes and plateaus; it winters south to Uttarakhand, Nepal, Sikkim and Bhutan, sometimes to lower altitudes

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: It is naturally found in Tibet and adjacent areas of central and western China, in the alpine temperate grassland and barren stony steppes and plateaus; it winters south to Uttarakhand, Nepal, Sikkim and Bhutan, sometimes to lower altitudes
